specific_question: When was the major decision to overhaul the warehouse operation processes at the Toronto branch made by the KM team in 2025?
answer: In October 2025, following a thorough study of major operational inefficiencies at the Toronto warehouse, the KM team decided to entirely restructure the processes at the location.
